response.title: Lead Healthcare Analyst
response.description: HealthFirst Solutions is seeking a motivated and experienced Lead Healthcare Analyst to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in healthcare data analysis and will lead analytical projects to improve patient care and operational efficiency. This role requires collaboration with clinical and operational teams to drive data-driven solutions and strategic initiatives.

required_skills: Proficient in SQL and database management
Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)
Strong understanding of healthcare data standards (e.g., HL7, ICD-10)
Expertise in statistical analysis and modeling techniques
Knowledge of healthcare regulations and compliance (e.g., HIPAA)
Ability to perform predictive analytics and trend analysis
Experience in project management methodologies (e.g., Agile, Six Sigma)
preferred_skills: Familiarity with Electronic Health Records (EHR) systems
Experience in healthcare quality improvement initiatives
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Healthcare Administration, Data Science, or related field; Master's degree preferred.
